text.title: JS/TS Frontend Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for testing-js-ts-frontend.

conclusion.verdict: no import needed; still use vi.* mocks
import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest' in every test
jest.fn / jest.mock; no Vitest API; globals available without import

text.example: runner=vitest, globals_true=false → import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest'; getByRole('option', {name: /order #1/i}) + userEvent + axe. Rule: explicit-imports-or-globals.
